response.justification: The candidate has a deep, ~15-year individual-contributor background with genuinely relevant developer-tooling work (custom test runners like Trial and Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup, GitLab/artifactory infrastructure, Selenium teaching, MCP code generators). However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, owning roadmaps, or leading a team — all titles are IC ('Senior/Staff Software Developer'). Strong on the hands-on and tooling side, but missing the core management qualification the role is built around.
strengths: Strong dev-tools/testing background (built test runners, CI/CD, test automation)
15+ years across web, mobile, embedded — broad technical depth
Active knowledge-sharing (workshops, courses) signaling mentorship aptitude
concerns: No demonstrated people-management or team-leadership experience
No evidence of roadmap ownership or organizational-change leadership
No mobile-platform-ecosystem build/infra experience at the required scale
